channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Meta launches Muse Spark 1.1 on its new Model API, claiming strong agentic and coding performance
item.description: The model features a 1M token context window.
item.content:encoded:
The model features a 1M token context window.

Original source: http://meta.ai

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/la5kkotu

  • Views: 18,151,976
  • Likes: 92,635
  • Bookmarks: 9,147
  • Quotes: 3,817
  • Replies: 7,086
  • Posts: 194

Top authors

  • Jason Wei
  • Elon Musk
  • Miles Brundage
  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • Alexandr Wang
(2) Muse Spark 1.1 is strongest at agentic performance, tool use, and computer use. It does well on long-running tasks with 1M token context window, can delegate execution to sub-agents running in parallel, and is trained to use computer interfaces on desktop, mobile, or browser.

item.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.6 model family, claiming Sol is 54% more token-efficient on agentic coding tasks
item.description: GPT-5.6 Sol autonomously post-trained the smaller Luna model.
item.content:encoded:
GPT-5.6 Sol autonomously post-trained the smaller Luna model.

Original source: https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-6

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/8l1la1pl

  • Views: 3,681,115
  • Likes: 47,242
  • Bookmarks: 4,864
  • Quotes: 598
  • Replies: 3,376
  • Posts: 119

Top authors

  • Sam Altman
  • Greg Brockman
  • Aravind Srinivas
  • Aaron Levie
  • Simon Willison
GPT-5.6 Sol sets a new standard for intelligence and efficiency, delivering state-of-the-art performance across coding, knowledge work, cybersecurity, and science with fewer tokens and lower cost. https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-6/

item.title: Daniel Kokotajlo and the AI 2027 team propose 'AI 2040: Plan A' for international superintelligence governance
item.description: The roadmap targets US-China compute negotiation agreements by 2029.
item.content:encoded:
The roadmap targets US-China compute negotiation agreements by 2029.

Original source: https://ai-2040.com/?r=tw

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/k80nzjeh

  • Views: 485,969
  • Likes: 4,778
  • Bookmarks: 2,420
  • Quotes: 85
  • Replies: 197
  • Posts: 83

Top authors

  • Miles Brundage
  • Boaz Barak
  • David Krueger 🦥 ⏸️ ⏹️ ⏪
  • Neel Nanda
  • Andreas Kirsch 🇺🇦
The AI 2027 team has written a new scenario, AI 2040.

item.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Work, an autonomous agent for long-horizon tasks powered by Codex and GPT-5.6
item.description: The tool adds a dropdown interface to toggle Codex mode.
item.content:encoded:
The tool adds a dropdown interface to toggle Codex mode.

Original source: https://help.openai.com/en/articles/20001275-chatgpt-work-and-codex

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/7yf6rr7y

  • Views: 1,024,391
  • Likes: 11,025
  • Bookmarks: 1,226
  • Quotes: 89
  • Replies: 1,266
  • Posts: 39

Top authors

  • Sam Altman
  • Greg Brockman
  • Miles Brundage
  • Ethan Mollick
  • Simon Willison
ChatGPT Work is powered by GPT-5.6. GPT-5.6 makes ChatGPT state of the art at reasoning through complex tasks and creating materials that match your templates, reference files, and preferred style. Just describe the outcome you want, without having to spell out every step to get there.

item.title: Elon Musk calls Anthropic the AI leader and claims its unreleased Mythos and Fable models are unmatched
item.description: Musk says he will not cut off Anthropic's leased compute
item.content:encoded:
Musk says he will not cut off Anthropic's leased compute

Original source: https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1970537297792651492

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/83xmdaog

  • Views: 4,650,396
  • Likes: 75,996
  • Bookmarks: 5,840
  • Quotes: 846
  • Replies: 2,625
  • Posts: 13

Top authors

  • Elon Musk
  • Amjad Masad
  • kache
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • Beff (e/acc)
He was known in his time as Elon the Bridgebuilder.

item.title: European Parliament extends Chat Control scanning rules through 2028 despite a majority of voting MEPs opposing the bill
item.description: The measure passed because the 314 opposing votes fell short of the absolute majority.
item.content:encoded:
The measure passed because the 314 opposing votes fell short of the absolute majority.

Original source: https://cadeproject.org/updates/european-parliament-rejects-extension-of-chat-control-rules-on-message-scanning/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/r2gde4np

  • Views: 2,141,361
  • Likes: 28,134
  • Bookmarks: 4,362
  • Quotes: 658
  • Replies: 753
  • Posts: 21

Top authors

  • Paul Graham
  • Julien Chaumond
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
  • @levelsio
  • Paul Buchheit
"This is How Liberty Dies....With Thunderous Applause." I never really understood what the Star Wars reference meant. Today, after Brussels, or rather the EU, pushed through the general, suspicionless surveillance of all chats in violation of its own laws and rules, I understand it very well. A dark day. Ironic how a world-famous film foresaw this.

item.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol variant sets an ARC-AGI-3 benchmark record of 7.8%
item.description: The frontier model successfully solved ARC-AGI-3 task #su15
item.content:encoded:
The frontier model successfully solved ARC-AGI-3 task #su15

Original source: http://arcprize.org/scorecards/model/openai-gpt-5-6-sol-max

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/y8mgvhbm

  • Views: 739,075
  • Likes: 5,928
  • Bookmarks: 706
  • Quotes: 30
  • Replies: 269
  • Posts: 37

Top authors

  • Lucas Beyer (bl16)
  • François Chollet
  • Jason Lee
  • Aidan McLaughlin
  • Boris Power
GPT-5.6-Sol worse than Fable on the Artificial Analysis Index

item.title: OpenAI executive Fidji Simo steps down from full-time role to become a part-time advisor
item.description: Simo stepped back following medical leave for a chronic illness.
item.content:encoded:
Simo stepped back following medical leave for a chronic illness.

Original source: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-07-09/openai-executive-fidji-simo-to-step-down-following-medical-leave?srnd=undefined

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/7kba2m43

  • Views: 1,356,178
  • Likes: 6,817
  • Bookmarks: 775
  • Quotes: 48
  • Replies: 384
  • Posts: 20

Top authors

  • Sam Altman
  • Miles Brundage
  • Sriram Krishnan
  • Lulu Cheng Meservey
  • Kevin Weil 🇺🇸
@sama Thanks for all the support, friendship and opportunities, Sam 💜

item.title: 1X releases new tendon-driven humanoid robot hands with 25 degrees of freedom for its NEO robot
item.description: The new hardware aims to achieve human-level dexterity and speed.
item.content:encoded:
The new hardware aims to achieve human-level dexterity and speed.

Original source: https://1x.tech/discover/neos-hands

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/vmkrw4qn

  • Views: 450,798
  • Likes: 3,649
  • Bookmarks: 448
  • Quotes: 46
  • Replies: 223
  • Posts: 29

Top authors

  • Miles Brundage
  • Andreas Kirsch 🇺🇦
  • Robert Scoble
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Pliny the Liberator 🐉󠅫󠄼󠄿󠅆󠄵󠄐󠅀󠄼󠄹󠄾󠅉󠅭
@1x_tech i wanna see neo play fur elise on piano

item.title: Anthropic resets all Claude usage rate limits following OpenAI GPT-5.6 and SuperApp launches
item.description: The surprise update clears accumulated limits across all at once.
item.content:encoded:
The surprise update clears accumulated limits across all at once.

Original source: https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2075279141352706215

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/ydrovmo5

  • Views: 765,383
  • Likes: 15,443
  • Bookmarks: 463
  • Quotes: 92
  • Replies: 810
  • Posts: 16

Top authors

  • Alex Albert
  • cat
  • Daniel
  • Andrew Curran
  • Thariq
What a move! Anthropic seriously waited until OpenAI released GPT-5.6 and the SuperApp before announcing they'd reset the weekly rates. That's a clear message to OpenAI.
